title: [Non-record] Codebooks! - val_bpb 1.2067 (3-seed mean)
author: mtybadger

data.description: Hadamard transform with random sign-flip and rotation to make blocked weights more isotropic before codebook assignment
Hessian-aware codebook index and scale assignment using GPTQ machinery and collected Hessians

parameters.schedule: turned on at end of training

data.description: Approximate codebook quantization run every 16 steps during training to provide quantization-aware feedback

novel_contributions: Fixed EP8 lattice codebook for weight compression
Hadamard transform preprocessing for blocked weights
Hessian-aware codebook assignment and scale selection
Lightweight quantization-aware proxy training with periodic approximate quantization and auxiliary L2 loss
Outlier-path fallback to int8 for hardest tensors
